input.title: HireFlow LinkedIn Candidate Scraper
input.description: Scrapes candidate profiles from LinkedIn based on job title, skills, and location filters. Returns structured candidate data for the HireFlow recruitment pipeline.

jobTitles.title: Job Titles
jobTitles.description: List of job titles to search for (e.g., 'Software Engineer', 'Product Manager'). Matches against candidate headlines and experience.

locations.title: Locations
locations.description: Target locations to filter candidates by (e.g., 'San Francisco', 'New York'). Leave empty to search all locations.

requiredSkills.title: Required Skills
requiredSkills.description: Skills the ideal candidate should have. Used for filtering and match scoring.

minExperience.title: Minimum Years of Experience
minExperience.description: Minimum years of professional experience required.

maxExperience.title: Maximum Years of Experience
maxExperience.description: Maximum years of professional experience. Set to 99 for no upper limit.

minSkillMatch.title: Minimum Skill Matches
minSkillMatch.description: Minimum number of required skills a candidate must have to be included in results.

maxResults.title: Maximum Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of candidate profiles to return.

dataset.title: Candidate Profiles
dataset.description: Scraped and enriched candidate profile data
